projectManifest.description: High-frequency commodity and solar market intelligence platform.

backend.jobQueue: BullMQ (backed by Redis) for scheduled API fetching

databaseAndCaching.inMemoryCache: Redis (for live ticker tape and session management)

indianMarket_Option1.source: Broker API (e.g., Zerodha Kite Connect / Upstox)
indianMarket_Option1.costStrategy: Utilize existing trading account API limits (~₹2000/month or free depending on broker)

globalMarket_Option3.source: International Feeds (e.g., OANDA API, Alpha Vantage, InfoLink/OPIS free tiers)
globalMarket_Option3.protocol: REST API (Polling via BullMQ cron jobs)
globalMarket_Option3.costStrategy: Free tier polling every 1-4 hours for non-volatile solar data

problem1_webSocketConnectionStability.challenge: Broker WebSockets disconnect frequently or drop packets under high load.

solutionArchitecture.implementation: Create an isolated Node.js process that ONLY handles the broker WS connection. If it crashes, the main backend API remains unaffected.
solutionArchitecture.resilience: Implement Exponential Backoff (reconnect in 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s) on 'disconnect' events. Store the last received tick in Redis.

problem2_dataNormalization.challenge: MCX data is in INR/Kg, Global Solar data is in USD/Watt. Structure is entirely different.

solutionArchitecture.implementation: Build a 'Data Normalizer' pipeline. 1. Fetch live USD/INR rate. 2. Pass all incoming ticks through a formatting function.

problem3_databaseBloat.challenge: Saving 5 ticks per second for 10 commodities will crash standard relational databases within weeks.

solutionArchitecture.pattern: OHLC Aggregation via TimescaleDB Continuous Aggregates
solutionArchitecture.implementation: Store raw ticks in a 'hypertable' for only 24 hours. Use TimescaleDB policies to automatically aggregate ticks into 1-minute, 5-minute, and 1-hour Open-High-Low-Close (OHLC) candles.
solutionArchitecture.queryStrategy: Frontend requests the 1-minute aggregate table, not the raw tick table, reducing payload size by 99%.

mainDashboard.bottomSection: Solar Supply Chain Price Waterfall (Wafer -> Cell -> Module)

hosting.frontend: Vercel (for edge caching and fast Next.js hydration)
hosting.database: Managed TimescaleDB Cloud or self-hosted Docker volume

deploymentStrategy.ci_cd: GitHub Actions (Lint -> Build -> Push Docker Image -> Restart PM2/Docker)
